## Summary

- What changed?
- Why now?

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / Tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:deploy-gate` when deployment-sensitive
- [ ] Manual QA completed where applicable

## Risk Review

- User-facing risk:
- Data / migration risk:
- External dependency or API risk:

## Rollback Plan

- How would this be reverted safely if it misbehaves?

## Related Work

- Issue / ticket:
- Follow-ups:
